remember: Students will be able to recall financial management concepts and definitions.
Students will be able to list the functions of financial management in an organization.
Students will be able to explain the importance of financial management in business.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role of financial management in achieving organizational goals.
Students will be able to explain the relationship between financial management and business strategy.
Students will be able to describe the impact of financial management on business performance.
apply: Students will be able to apply financial management concepts to real-world business scenarios.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of financial management practices in an organization.
Students will be able to recommend financial management strategies to improve business performance.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze financial statements to assess business performance and make informed decisions.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of external factors on financial management decisions.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different financial management approaches and their implications.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the concept of financial management and its importance in business.
Students will be able to explain the functions of financial management and its role in achieving organizational goals.
Students will be able to analyze financial statements and make informed decisions.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the concept of financial management and its importance in business (weightage: 6 marks).
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of financial management on business performance (weightage: 12 marks).
Students will be able to apply financial management concepts to real-world business scenarios (weightage: 10 marks).
